title: hypericum × inodorum subsp. elatum
intro: Hypericum × inodorum subsp. elatum, also known as tall elatum St. John's Wort, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the St. John's Wort family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin. The health benefits of tall elatum St. John's Wort include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Tall elatum St. John's Wort can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, making it accessible for different applications.
